event: Christ Preaching at Cookham Regatta: Conversation Between Punts
description: A densely packed composition showing numerous figures in flat-bottomed boats (punts) crowded together on a body of water. The figures recline on cushions and blankets in various relaxed poses — some conversing, some reaching toward other boats, some lounging. The scene is rendered in warm flesh tones with colorful fabrics and cushions in floral patterns, pink, green, and red. The boats are packed so tightly together that figures from adjacent boats overlap and interact. The overall impression is of a summer river gathering with casual intimacy among the participants.

_meta.title: Christ Preaching at Cookham Regatta: Conversation Between Punts
